heading: Application for issuance of certificate of review
label: 4012 Application for issuance of certificate of review
notes: Effective DateSection effective 90 days after effective date of rules and regulations first promulgated under , see set out as a note under .section 4020 of this titlesection 312(b) of Pub. L. 97–290section 4011 of this title

children.heading: Written form; limitation to export trade; compliance with regulations
children.label: a Written form; limitation to export trade; compliance with regulations

children.text: specifies conduct limited to export trade, and

is in a form and contains any information, including information pertaining to the overall market in which the applicant operates, required by rule or regulation promulgated under .section 4020 of this title

children.heading: Publication of notice of application; transmittal to Attorney General
children.label: b Publication of notice of application; transmittal to Attorney General

children.text: Within ten days after an application submitted under subsection (a) is received by the Secretary, the Secretary shall publish in the Federal Register a notice that announces that an application for a certificate of review has been submitted, identifies each person submitting the application, and describes the conduct for which the application is submitted.

children.label: B
children.text: any information submitted to the Secretary in connection with the application, and

children.label: C
children.text: any other relevant information (as determined by the Secretary) in the possession of the Secretary, including information regarding the market share of the applicant in the line of commerce to which the conduct specified in the application relates.
